name: PLEASE STOP CRYING: TERRIBLE TWOS
short_description: PLEASE STOP CRYING: Terrible Twos is a lighthearted horror game about a father yet again struggling to keep up with his baby at a restaurant.
detailed_description:
Step into the role of a stressed father who has to balance taking care of his toddler while simultaneously making sure the restaurant they are at stays in one place.

PLEASE STOP CRYING: Terrible Twos is a horror game with a design of emulating the stress one may experience when taking a toddler to a public restaurant. Ever feel like you don't want to cook? It may even be worse when you go out!

FEATURES:

This is a fast-paced FPS, lighthearted horror game where your goals are to fix up any mess your toddler made, whilst keeping said toddler from crying.

Complete all the crazy tasks ranging from cleaning, cooking to even playing instruments to achieve a record time and the honorable title of "DAD OF THE YEAR". Or choose an alternative, less honorable ending....

Enjoy the crispy 90s era graphics for the best experience.
